title: Event name without module prefix
description: CreateEvent() or SendEvent() uses an event name without the module name prefix, risking collision in the global event system.
explanation: CMSMS events are global. The convention is ModuleName::EventName (e.g. 'News::NewsArticleAdded'). Unprefixed events like 'ItemSaved' will collide.
fix: Use the ModuleName::EventName pattern for all custom events.
